tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows impaired fasting glucose with normal HbA1c, suggesting possible early glucose metabolism disturbance. Lipid profile indicates significant dyslipidemia (high total cholesterol, LDL, triglycerides, and low HDL), increasing cardiovascular risk. Renal function and electrolytes are within normal limits except for mildly elevated chloride. Urine microalbumin/creatinine is normal. Recommend further evaluation for metabolic syndrome and cardiovascular risk management.
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
